official_functions.role: Construct the official singleton Configuration clientbound clear_dialog packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound clear_dialog body; bytecode initializes it with StreamCodec.unit(INSTANCE)
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed clear_dialog packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed clear_dialog packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded clear_dialog packet type from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the clear_dialog body.
The official ClientboundClearDialogPacket.STREAM_CODEC is a singleton unit codec and writes an empty body.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundClearDialogPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundClearDialogPacket preserves the clear_dialog packet type and singleton identity.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, singleton equality, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove dialog UI clearing behavior, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer dialog UI clearing behavior, screen flow, Configuration-to-Play readiness, registry hydration, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
